subcodes.first_line: Verily, the Most Great Ocean hath turned unto thee from the prison-precinct, that it might reveal unto thee the pearls of wisdom and utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان البحر الاعظم اقبل الیک من شطر السجن لیریک لئالی الحکمة و البیان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
